title: Gift Card Information

Documents that focus on these protective accessories, their types, installation, safety/legal considerations, and performance characteristics are considered relevant; items unrelated to sun protection (e.g., windshield cleaning tips) are not.

title: Option Right PoleEmploi
description: What is the "right of option" in the Pôle Emploi unemployment system and what are its eligibility conditions and procedural steps?
narrative: The user is looking for a clear explanation of the "right of option" (droit d'option) offered by Pôle Emploi, including how it changes the calculation of unemployment benefits, the specific thresholds (e.g., hours worked, daily allowance limits, percentage increase), the required actions (notification period, forms, advisor contact), and any consequences of exercising the option. Relevant documents are those that define the right of option, list the quantitative criteria (e.g., at least 910 hours or 130 days, daily allowance ≤ 20 €, or a 30 % increase), describe the application process, and discuss how it interacts with reloadable rights. Documents unrelated to the right of option—such as intermittent‑general regime rules, health‑care option plans, or unrelated training allowances—are not relevant.

title: Return-to-Work Bonus
description: What are the eligibility criteria, amount, application procedure, and current availability of the French return‑to‑work bonus?
narrative: The user wants detailed, up‑to‑date information on the French "prime de retour à l'emploi" (return‑to‑work bonus).
